tool.name: add_hypothesis
tool.description: Add a new vulnerability hypothesis for an attack surface.

parameter.name: vuln_class
parameter.description: Vulnerability class such as sqli, xss, ssrf, idor.

tool.name: record_payload_test
tool.description: Record a payload test outcome for a hypothesis.

tool.name: confirm_hypothesis
tool.description: Mark a hypothesis as confirmed with evidence.

tool.name: reject_hypothesis
tool.description: Mark a hypothesis as rejected with a reason.

tool.name: query_hypotheses
tool.description: Query hypotheses by status and/or class.

tool.name: get_hypothesis_summary
tool.description: Get a summary of hypothesis ledger state and priorities.

tool.name: has_tested_payload
tool.description: Check whether a payload was already tested for surface/class.
